steps.title: Fit the line in Desmos
steps.content: The table gives points such as $(2,-\frac{183}{10})$ and $(4,-\frac{171}{10})$. Since the relationship is linear, enter those points and run $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$.

steps.title: Read the intercept from the line
steps.content: The regression gives $m=\frac{3}{5}$ and $b=-\frac{39}{2}$, so the line is $y=\frac{3}{5}x-\frac{39}{2}$. The $x$-intercept occurs when $y=0$.
